name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: New version numbering, starting at V2.0.1. The last two numbers roll over at 9 — after V2.0.9 comes V2.1.0, and after V2.9.9 comes V3.0.0.
Nothing about how the app works has changed — this is only how versions are numbered from now on.
